Assessments, Grading, Deadlines

Rounding will be to the 2nd decimal. For example, 89.985 becomes 89.99, or B+ if straight curve. Keeping rules such as these ensure that all students are treated in an equal manner.

No extra credit options for this class.

Concerns with a grade on any assignment must be addressed within one week of the return of that assignment. No exceptions.

Class Attendance:
Not counting the first class, there are 24 lectures (and 2 midterms).
5 points per lecture attended with max score earned being 100 points.
Given that 24 x 4 = 120, no penalty for missing up to 4 classes
(and no extra credit for earning more than 100 points)
*** Do NOT inform Prof/GSI if you miss attendance

Section Participation:
Someone who came almost every week, was prepared, and participated: 70 points
Someone who attended at least 75% of weeks, was prepared, and participated: 50
Someone who attended about half, was prepared, and participated: 35
Someone who attended around 25% of weeks, was prepared, and participated: 20
Someone who attended once or not at all, was prepared, and participated: 10 0

Physiology:

Resting potential:  -70 mV (millivolts)
    Due to “locked-in” negatively
    charged ions and blockage of

    hyperpolarization:  inhibitory

Action potential:
    When potential reaches threshold
    (around -40 mV), membrane
    changes allowing massive inflow
    of sodium to +50 mV

  - **IPSP: inhibitory**
